info.title: Business Systems Integration Hub API
info.description: A comprehensive middleware platform for synchronizing data between various business systems

systemType.description: Type of the system (NetSuite, Salesforce, etc.)

systemId.description: Unique identifier for the system instance

credentialType.description: Type of credentials (oauth1, oauth2, basic, api_key)

accessCount.description: Number of times credentials have been accessed

get.description: Retrieves a list of all configured integrations in the system

post.description: Creates a new integration configuration with validation
Validates an integration configuration and checks connectivity

warnings: Consider enabling real-time sync for better performance

get.description: Returns metadata for all stored credentials without exposing sensitive data

post.description: Securely store credentials for a system using the configured secret manager

systemId.description: Unique identifier for the system instance

credentials.description: Credential object (structure depends on system type)

get.summary: Get credential metadata for a specific system
get.description: Returns metadata for credentials without exposing sensitive data

post.description: Replace existing credentials with new ones, keeping backup

get.description: Returns overview of credential health across all integrations

get.summary: Validate credential security across all integrations
get.description: Performs security audit of all integration credentials

post.description: Migrate existing credentials from environment variables and inline configs to secret manager

put.description: Update credentials for a specific system within an integration

post.summary: Import field mappings from CSV or Excel file
post.description: Upload and parse a CSV or Excel file containing field mapping configurations

file.description: CSV or Excel file containing field mappings

integrationId.description: Optional integration ID to associate mappings with

validateOnly.description: Only validate the file without importing

post.summary: Export field mappings to CSV or Excel
post.description: Generate and download a CSV or Excel file with current field mapping configurations

integrationId.description: Integration ID to export mappings from

get.description: Download a template CSV or Excel file for field mapping imports

post.description: Check if uploaded file is valid for import without processing

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file

get.description: Returns detailed health status including memory, process, and configuration information
Kubernetes-style readiness check - returns 200 if ready to serve traffic
Kubernetes-style liveness check - returns 200 if process is alive

post.description: Runs a complete synchronization process for the specified integration

batchSize.description: Number of records to process in each batch

dryRun.description: Run validation without making actual changes

startDate.description: Sync records modified after this date

recordsToProcess.description: Estimated number of records to sync

post.description: Validates the integration configuration and tests connectivity to source and target systems
Synchronizes a specific record between source and target systems

recordId.description: Unique identifier of the record to sync

direction.description: Direction of synchronization (optional, uses config default)

dryRun.description: Run validation without making actual changes

targetRecordId.description: Target system record ID after sync

fieldsUpdated.description: List of fields that were modified

404.description: Integration configuration or record not found

post.description: Stops a currently running integration synchronization process

success.description: Whether the integration was successfully stopped

recordsProcessed.description: Number of records processed before stopping

get.description: Returns overall system statistics and breakdowns for integrations
Retrieves the current status and execution details for a specific integration

avgResponseTime.description: Average API response time in milliseconds

recordId.description: Record ID that caused the error

get.summary: Get sample training examples for a dataset

post.description: Initiates a full synchronization between SuiteCentral and NetSuite systems

get.summary: Get SuiteCentral to NetSuite sync status
get.description: Returns the current status of the SuiteCentral to NetSuite synchronization
